2025_W51_FP_Key_Title: Enjoy the warmth of a renewal

Renew your plan with this exclusive 50% off, and further boost your creative work with more generations using leading AI models like Google Nano Banana or Kling 01.

2026_W03_IAM_CF_Promo_campaign_January_I: Take the right creative step this year

Switch to annual and enjoy an upgraded path to boost your projects year-round with 60% off. Access top AI features and models like Google Nano Banana and Kling O1, plus more generations during 365 days to keep creative projects moving.

2026_W03_In-app-Business-launchNoti_Main: Made for small teams and agencies. Includes shared credits and collaborative tools like Projects and Spaces to create, review, and share work together. Supports up to 20 seats. Legal indemnification included.

2026_W04_IAM_Battle_of_pricingNoti_Main-: The strongest AI deal lives here

A Freepik subscription is the only one that lets you create with Nano Banana PRO UNLIMITED. And if that weren't enough, find top AI models like Google Veo 3.1, Kling 2.6 Motion Control, and Seedream 4.5 at their lowest credit cost. All this offer is here to stay!
2026_W06_IAM_Pro_2_years_IAM_Main-Text_2:
Two full years of Pro at 85% OFF. Unlimited AI models like Nano Banana Pro and Kling, 7.2M credits, and early access to new AI features, built for creators who scale.

Valid until February 5th for a two-year Pro plan purchase.
2026_W06_IAM_Spaces_Batch_List_IAM_Main_: Live demo: Batch creation with Spaces

Join Martin for a 45-minute session on YouTube. See how the List node feature in Spaces lets you add multiple prompts or instructions to a single node and run them together to process full campaigns and generate variations in batch.
Martin is going live at 17:00 CET. Learn how the List node feature in Spaces makes it possible to run multiple prompts at once and create campaign variations in batch. Don't miss it.
Martin is streaming right now. Learn how the List node feature in Spaces works and how one node can run multiple prompts together to generate variations in batch.

2026_W08_IAM_Magnific_Video_Upscaler_IAM: Give your videos a Magnific boost
Your clips deserve a studio-grade look. Magnific Video Upscaler takes your videos to 4K with enhanced textures and details. Start with ready-to-use Presets, or go Custom for full creative control.

Take creative control of your upscaling. Magnific Video Upscaler lets you shape every frame up to 4K with flavors, a Creativity slider, FPS Boost, Smart Grain and Premium Quality. Use Presets for a simpler experience.
